Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 2026

1. Information We Collect

At Hope International Academy, we are committed to protecting the privacy and security of our students, parents, and staff. We collect personal information such as names, contact details, educational records, and health information only when necessary to provide our educational services effectively, process admissions, and ensure student safety.

2. How We Use Your Information

The information we collect is used solely for school administration, academic tracking, communication with parents, and providing medical assistance when needed. We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data with third parties without explicit consent, except as required by law or as necessary to provide essential school services.

3. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures, including physical, technical, and administrative safeguards, to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of personal data stored in our digital systems and physical files.

4. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding our Privacy Policy or the handling of your data, please contact our administrative office at info@hopeinternationalacademy.com.

Hope International Academy is dedicated to developing the full potential of every student. We shape characters and build futures through excellence in education.
